---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: The GREENBEAN checklist for reporting studies evaluating the effectiveness
  of EEG-based biomarkers
acronym: GREENBEAN
description: Reporting of studies evaluating the effectiveness of EEG-based biomarkers.
rg-doi: 10.1016/j.clinph.2025.2110777
pmid-id: ''
pmid-url: ''
relevant-urls: '[Read the full text](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1388245725006297)
  of GREENBEAN.'
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Ewen JB, Bablioni C, Collins GS, Ethridge LE, Gotman
  J, Ikeda A, Karoly PJ, Potter WZ, Rampp S, Seeck M, Beniczky S. The GREENBEAN checklist
  for reporting studies evaluating the effectiveness of EEG-based biomarkers. Clinical
  Neurophysiology. 2025; 176: 2110777.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: |-
  The GREENBEAN checklist can be downloaded from [here](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/GREENBEAN-Checklist.docx).

  The explanation and elaboration can be found in the [supplementary material](https://ars.els-cdn.com/content/image/1-s2.0-S1388245725006297-mmc1.docx) of the article.
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
- Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- No keywords provided

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
